creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)
I think it has a historical reason. As I check the first version (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/deskutils/fet/Makefile?revision=254070&view=markup#l10) had got the "kde" category too.
IMHO can/should it remove.
